Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Watchman]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — The founder of the Greenwarden order was a woman who took the name 'Watchman'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Andel picked up a saber from the corpse of a Watchman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 15''' — Calder is a Watchman with the Blackwatch Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — Watchmen are officials who can take a person's word for an emergency if they wear a Watchman's coat and badge.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — The prisoner is a former Watchman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 27''' — The former Watchman is a Blackwatch traitor.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Watchmen are described by Jerri as reclusive and shady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Every Watchman in the Blackwatch is sworn to protect people from unbelievable things.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — The Watchman works as the Guild Head's personal attendant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — The Watchman may have been killed.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — A Watchman could pick up the Sleepless cell in the Capital.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — The Watchman commanded someone to say something else.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
